kernel_subject: net: dev: Makes sure netif_rx() can be invoked in any context.
stage1_reason: Both changes are direct adaptations to kernel API changes: 1) netif_rx_ni() -> netif_rx() due to netif_rx() becoming safe in all contexts (commit baebdf48c3600), 2) spi remove callback return type changed from int to void as part of SPI subsystem API standardization.
stage2_reason: Driver commit 90f77c1c512f replaces netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx(), directly matching kernel commit baebdf48c360 which made netif_rx() safe in all contexts, enabling this migration.
